prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your early career advancement forward
items: Complete an online course or certification in a high-demand skill for your target role
Complete a comprehensive skills assessment and identify 3 key skills gaps for your target role
Enroll in and complete a 30-day online micro-learning challenge in a high-demand technical skill for your industry
Create and launch a professional portfolio showcasing 3 specific projects that demonstrate skills relevant to your target role
Set up and complete 3 skill-building challenges on a professional platform like HackerRank, Kaggle, or GitHub
Create a detailed skill development plan with monthly milestones for the next 6 months
